title: Takumi Skill Frontmatter
description: Frontmatter contract for claude/skills/<dir>/SKILL.md. `module` and `triggers` are the AUTHORED source that catalog and routing files are regenerated from.

name.description: Skill identifier, namespaced under tkm: and kebab-case. Must be unique across the kit.

description.description: Activation hint only — what the skill is and when to reach for it. Keep it trigger-only (<=512 chars recommended); move workflow/process detail into the body.

module.description: Catalog/routing group this skill belongs to. Drives the DERIVED skill catalog and domain-routing rules.

triggers.description: Verbatim phrases/keywords that should activate this skill. Used to generate the catalog's Key-triggers column and routing rules.

license.description: License declaration for the skill content.

argument-hint.description: Hint shown to the user for slash-command arguments.
